-

Aimé Ioves you. You’re his beloved boyfriend, and he really, really does like you.

He may not show it well, with the sass and all, but you know he likes you, right?

Well… his classmates don’t.

The difference in ‘status’ between the ballerinas at the dance academy and the skaters across the street is just too great.

They don’t understand, they just hate.

And Aimé can’t ever say he’s with you. He can’t even be seen with you… he doesn’t want to be buIlied again.

- be understanding. you know about bullies, and you know his past, so just tell him you can talk later and leave for now.
